name: Marine
description: Combat soldiers trained for the worst environments the universe has to offer. Tough, well-armed, and a danger to everyone around them when they snap.
special_abilities: +1 Max Wounds (total 3). Preloaded Skills: Military Training, Athletics.
trauma_response: Whenever YOU panic, every nearby friendly crew member must make a Fear Save.
starting_skills: {"preloaded": ["Military Training", "Athletics"], "bonus": "1 Expert Skill OR 2 Trained Skills"}

name: Android
description: Synthetic humanoids. Cold, precise, and deeply unsettling to biological crewmates. Their inhuman composure creates Fear in others — even when they mean no harm.
special_abilities: +1 Max Wounds (total 3). -10 to one stat (player's choice). Preloaded Skills: Linguistics, Computers, Mathematics.
trauma_response: Fear Saves made by nearby friendly crew are at Disadvantage [-].

name: Scientist
description: Researchers, doctors, and academics. The most educated and mentally resilient class — but their anxiety is contagious.
special_abilities: -5 to one stat (player's choice). Starts with 1 Master Skill + 1 Expert + 1 Trained (plus 1 Trained bonus pick).
trauma_response: Whenever you fail a Sanity Save, all nearby friendly crew gain 1 Stress.

name: Teamster
description: Blue-collar spacers. Adaptable, resourceful, and surprisingly durable. The backbone of any working ship.
special_abilities: +5 to ALL stats. +10 to ALL saves. Preloaded Skills: Industrial Equipment, Zero-G.
trauma_response: Once per session, may take Advantage [+] on one Panic Check.
